description_long: This is a matte black cup with a rounded body and a single, thick handle attached to one side. The cup features a striking red snake motif on its exterior, with the snake's head and coiled body clearly visible. The interior of the cup is deep and dark, suggesting it is empty and clean. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The cup's surface appears smooth with a subtle gradient from dark gray at the base to black at the rim. There are no visible cracks, chips, or additional adornments aside from the snake design.
description: A matte black cup with a thick handle and a bold red snake motif on its side. The surface is smooth and the cup has a deep, dark interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red snake motif and the handle on the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and no visible motif or decoration.
description_view_2: Front view with the red snake motif and the handle on the left side.
description_view_3: Back view with no handle or motif visible, showing only the smooth, dark surface.
